user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new survey approver, so that surveys can be routed to the correct people for approval.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Approvers screen; When I click Add new survey approver; Then I can define a new approver entry

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of survey approvers with their group ID, location, and approvers, so that I can review the approval configuration.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Approvers screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns for Exit Approvers Group ID, Location Id, Location(s), and Approver(s)

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to map approvers to specific locations, so that the correct approver handles surveys for each location.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding a survey approver; When I select Location(s) and Approver(s); Then the mapping is saved to the approver list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to navigate to Email Templates from the Survey Approvers screen, so that I can manage related survey notifications.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Approvers screen; When I click the Email Templates link; Then I am taken to the email templates configuration

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next step or cancel from the Survey Approvers screen, so that I can control the configuration workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Approvers screen; When I click Next or Cancel; Then I advance to the next step or exit without saving respectively
